title: Preserve full storefront with admin access linked to lanepeevy@gmail.com

requirements.text: Retain all existing storefront features: product listings on the store page, shopping cart, checkout flow with payment proof upload, order success page, gallery page, custom order form, and home/landing page — exactly as previously implemented.

quotes: I just need everything that's already in there

acceptanceCriteria: Store page displays all products fetched from the backend
Shopping cart persists items and shows correct totals
Checkout page submits orders with optional payment proof upload
Order success page shows confirmation details
Gallery page renders all gallery items
Custom order form allows file upload and submission

requirements.text: Grant admin access exclusively to the Internet Identity account associated with lanepeevy@gmail.com. This account must be able to access the admin dashboard to add/edit/delete products, view and update orders, manage gallery items, and review payment confirmations.

quotes: The advent should be linked to the email that I have provided
needs to have access to ad products and everything that has already been there

acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard is accessible only when signed in with the Internet Identity linked to lanepeevy@gmail.com
Non-admin users and unauthenticated users are redirected away from the admin dashboard
Admin can add, edit, and delete products from the Products Management tab
Admin can view all orders and update their statuses from the Orders Management tab
Admin can manage gallery items from the Gallery Management tab
Admin can view payment confirmation submissions and proof images from the Payments Management tab

requirements.text: Display the Creative Prints logo in the site header consistently across all pages.

quotes: I can also use your logo (the 'Creative Prints' circular logo with the 3D printer) in the app header

acceptanceCriteria: Creative Prints logo appears in the sticky header on every page
Logo is properly sized and does not break the header layout on mobile or desktop

constraints: Admin authentication must use Internet Identity only — no traditional email/password login system
The guaranteed admin email must remain lanepeevy@gmail.com in the backend access control
Do not remove or alter any existing data models (Product, GalleryItem, CustomOrder, StoreOrder, PaymentConfirmation, UserProfile)
All immutable frontend paths must not be modified
nonGoals: Adding new features beyond what was previously implemented
Adding new product categories or featured items section unless already present
